news.title:
Nearly 30 Nifty stocks declined, including HDFCLife, Sun Pharma, DRL, NTPC, and Cipla.
Top gainers were Hindalco, Trent, BEL, Tech Mahindra, and Titan.
news.summary:

news.title:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.
news.summary:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.

news.title:
HDFC Life's board to meet on April 16, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 results.
Trading window closed April 1-18, 2026, for insiders as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
HDFC Life's board to meet on April 16, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 results.
Trading window closed April 1-18, 2026, for insiders as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title:
HDFC Life faces ₹126.46 cr tax demand plus ₹45.55 cr interest.
The company plans to challenge the order, citing no financial impact.
news.summary:
HDFC Life faces ₹126.46 cr tax demand plus ₹45.55 cr interest.
The company plans to challenge the order, citing no financial impact.

news.title: Morgan Stanley keeps Overweight rating on HDFC Life, revises target price to 840 from 875.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley keeps Overweight rating on HDFC Life, revises target price to 840 from 875.

news.title:
HDFC Life announces participation in Morgan Stanley Virtual India Financials Seminar on March 19, 2026.
Investor presentation for the event is hosted on HDFC Life's website; schedule subject to change.
news.summary:

news.title:
HDFC Life faces GST tax demand of Rs 104.8 crore plus Rs 94.3 crore interest.
Deputy Commissioner upheld the demand; appeal planned, no financial impact expected.
news.summary:
HDFC Life faces GST tax demand of Rs 104.8 crore plus Rs 94.3 crore interest.
Deputy Commissioner upheld the demand; appeal planned, no financial impact expected.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.

news.title:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
news.summary:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.

news.title:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.
news.summary:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.

news.title:

Events include Axis Capital, Nuvama, Kotak Securities, and IIFL conferences in Mumbai.

news.title:

Profit after tax rose 7% to ₹1,414cr; solvency ratio remains strong at 180%.
